CMHC.definition: Canadian federal crown corporation providing housing data including rental and vacancy statistics.

Stealth Browser.definition: A Playwright browser context configured with playwright-stealth to bypass Cloudflare anti-bot detection.

DOM Parser.definition: A component that extracts structured data from raw HTML using BeautifulSoup4, completely decoupled from network I/O.
examples: CMHCParser takes HTML string in, DataFrame out

Exponential Backoff.definition: A retry strategy where wait time doubles after each failed attempt, used for retryable HTTP errors (429, 409, 503).

validate_structure.definition: A pre-parse check in CMHCParser that verifies expected HTML elements (<table>, <thead>) exist before attempting data extraction. Returns False and logs CRITICAL if the CMHC portal changed its DOM layout.
